genre_refs: Art Deco WPA travel/space posters; retro-futurist space-program art
description: AI-generated illustrated poster in an Art Deco style with a warm gold, cream, and black palette and a thin cream border. The central image is a rocket lifting off vertically on a column of golden flame and exhaust, surrounded by stylized smoke clouds at the base and a starry night sky with concentric arc lines radiating outward behind it. A small wing emblem appears on the rocket's nose cone. At the bottom in bold white sans-serif lettering reads 'UNLOCK THE NEXT FRONTIER', and beneath it in smaller letters the URL 'APPRENTICESHIP.GOV'.
